track_description: The [bold] Artificial Intelligence Track [/bold] equips students with core concepts and practical know-how to build innovative AI applications that impact business and society.
track_jobs_examples: Chatbot Engineer | Data and AI Solution Architect | Machine Learning Developer
track_prospects: Artificial Intelligence (AI) models aim to augment or substitute human intelligence by building systems that think for themselves and improve over time.

track_description: The [bold] Cybersecurity Track [/bold] equips students with cybersecurity theory and practice, covering aspects of security fundamentals in some areas like network, data and software security.
track_jobs_examples: Cybersecurity Operations Engineer | Fraud Analyst | Infrastructure Technical Analyst
track_prospects: With the explosion of cyberspace threats, cybersecurity professionals are in high demand world-wide by both the public and private sectors.

track_description: The [bold] Cyber-Physical Systems Track [/bold] equips students with core concepts and practical knowledge on designing and implementing CPS for the society. These include topics such as distributed systems, Internet of Things (IoT), and pervasive computing.
track_jobs_examples: Consultant - Digital Strategy, Industry 4.0 | IoT Solution Architect | VR-AR Systems Engineer
track_prospects: Cyber-Physical Systems (CPS) are typically made up of embedded devices that are able to sense the physical environment, communicate with each other, as well as control physical processes. CPS are widely used in several application domains of smart cities such as in transportation networks, smart grid systems, smart homes/buildings, healthcare, and manufacturing.

track_description: The [bold] Business Analytics Track [/bold] aims to provide students with the concepts, methods and best practices of data analytics through working on real world use cases and practicum.
track_jobs_examples: Business Analyst | Business Development Consultant | Business and Product Strategist
track_prospects: There is an increasing use of data analytics to discover organisational issues and to drive strategies in digital transformation. This has created a rising demand for graduates who understand how to use data analytics to solve real-world problems.

track_description: The [bold] Digitalisation & Cloud Solutions Track [/bold] enables students to engineer IT solutions to enhance operational excellence, integrate information-processes-people and drive innovation.
track_jobs_examples: Digital Business Integration Analyst | Enterprise Architect | Technology Strategist
track_prospects: Technological disruption is challenging the future of business process designs and models. This has compelled organisations to take advantage of new technologies to innovate and seamlessly integrate the physical and digital world. This has created new job roles and opportunities.

track_description: The [bold] Product Development Track [/bold] provides students with the skills and knowledge to excel in the fields of Software Development and Product Management. It prepares them to engineer IT solutions that enhance operational excellence, integrate information-processes-people and drive innovation.​
track_jobs_examples: Full Stack Developer​ | Software Architect​ | Product Security Engineer​ | Product Manager
track_prospects: Digital Transformation and Technological disruption are challenging the future of business everywhere. This has compelled organisations to take advantage of new trends and technologies to innovate and seamlessly integrate the physical and digital world.

track_description: The [bold] Financial Technology Track [/bold] covers the foundations of enterprise architecture in banking and the functional domain areas such as retail and corporate banking, digital payments and innovations, and financial markets.
track_jobs_examples: Financial Application Developer | Revenue Assurance Manager
track_prospects: Singapore is one of the top 5 financial centres in the world, and financial technology professionals are in high demand in the traditional banking sector and in non-bank alternative FinTech companies.

track_description: The [bold] Smart-City Management and Technology Track [/bold] offers unique interdisciplinary pathways to develop the skills necessary for solving problems in the smart-city domain.
track_jobs_examples: Data Analyst/Scientist | IT Consultant | Sustainable Solutions Developer | Urban Solutions Researcher
track_prospects: Cities around the world are evolving into connected and technology-enabled societies. Smart cities are those that use technology to make a positive impact on the lives of people, businesses, and the environment.

track_description: The [bold] Software Systems Track [/bold] equips students with IT solution development skills for a variety of modern computing platforms: mixed reality, advanced databases, mobile devices, embedded sensing systems, and full stack development spanning multiple platforms.
track_jobs_examples: Full Stack Developer | Mobile Application Developer | AR/VR/XR Developer
track_prospects: Modern computing systems comprise a medley of devices, from smartphones to laptops to servers to tiny embedded computers so pervasive in everyday life.

track_description: The [bold] Frontier Artificial Intelligence Track [/bold] equips students with core concepts and practical know-how to build innovative AI applications that impact business and society.
track_jobs_examples: Chatbot Engineer | Data and AI Solution Architect | Machine Learning Developer
track_prospects: Artificial Intelligence (AI) models aim to augment or substitute human intelligence by building systems that think for themselves and improve over time.
